rulings.Case Title: IN RE: JOHN SOLLNER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing Re Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 11, 2014, line 1. PETITIONER JOHN SOLLNER and SAMETC, LLC.'s Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration GRANTED in part. Parties are ordered to arbitrate disputes as outlined in Sollner Declaration paragraphs 12 and 13. Parties should meet and confer and provide a name of a mutually agreeable arbitrator to the Court no later than December 26, 2014. If parties are unable to agree, each party should submit a list of three arbitrators no later than January 2, 2014. Each party may object to one arbitrator provided by the other party no later than January 9, 2014. Prevailing party submit a proposed order leaving the name of the arbitrator blank. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. JOHN A. PHILLIPS et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 11, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANTs JOHN PHILLIPS, DEAN PHILLIPS and ARISTOTLE INTERNATIONAL, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to January 8, 2015 per stipulation of parties. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than December 19, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE SAM MAZZA FOUNDATION VS. JEFF SHELTON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Cross-Defendants' Demurer To Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 11, 2014, line 5. CROSS COMPLAINANT JEFF SHELTON's Motion To Strike Cross-Defendants' Demurer To Cross-Complaint DENIED. No authorities cited in support of the request. Counsel's failure to follow through with her agreements with opposing counsel does not appear to be grounds for striking a demurrer filed before entry of default. Late-filed opposition is stricken. Opposing counsel is reminded that compliance with the Code of Civil Procedure, Rules of Court and Local rules is mandatory. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE SAM MAZZA FOUNDATION VS. JEFF SHELTON et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 11, 2014, line 5. CROSS DEFENDANTs THE SAM MAZZA FOUNDATION, JEANETTE COOL and DORIAN COOL's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges all causes of action against all defendants. Complaint is not uncertain. Moving party improperly raises issues of fact outside the allegations contained in the complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC A DELAWARE VS. KAREN TUBACH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, December 11, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANTs KAREN TUBACH and KEVIN SULLIVAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to attach a proof of service in compliance with CCP 1013a with a legible name of the server. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Notice and complaint sufficiently assert a cause of action for unlawful detainer and are not uncertain. Moving party and its counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. = (501/REQ)
